introSection: Blue Tornado is a Vekoma inverted roller coaster located at Gardaland in Castelnuovo del Garda, Veneto, Italy. With an added helix, it is an extended version of Vekoma's standard Suspended Looping Coaster design.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Parts of the ride were repainted in 2010 and 2014. In 2015, the colours of the station were changed and new special effects were added.

In 2023, new lighting was installed that follows the train around the track. The trains were refurbished the following year and additional effects were added.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Light blue track and blue supports. The ride opened with white track, which was later repainted to the current colour.

fullText:
Blue Tornado is a Vekoma inverted roller coaster located at Gardaland in Castelnuovo del Garda, Veneto, Italy. With an added helix, it is an extended version of Vekoma's standard Suspended Looping Coaster design.

Parts of the ride were repainted in 2010 and 2014. In 2015, the colours of the station were changed and new special effects were added.

In 2023, new lighting was installed that follows the train around the track. The trains were refurbished the following year and additional effects were added.



Light blue track and blue supports. The ride opened with white track, which was later repainted to the current colour.
